text:
Perfect! All changes completed successfully. 

## Summary of Changes:

### **Created Proper Chain Dropdown Menu**
- Added `DropdownMenu` component imports
- Replaced the cycling button with a proper dropdown menu
- The dropdown now shows:
  - All available chains in a list
  - Each chain with its logo/icon
  - Chain name next to the logo
  - A checkmark (✓) next to the currently connected chain
  - Clicking any chain will switch to that chain
  - Success/error toasts when switching chains

Now when you click on the chain badge in the header, it will show a dropdown menu with all available chains, their logos, and you can select any chain to switch to it. The current chain is marked with a checkmark.
